name: AI-Powered Notes with RAG
summary: Note AI is an intelligent note-taking application powered by AI. It allows users to create and manage notes, and then ask questions about their notes using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) with OpenAI. It’s a great example of combining Next.js, Convex, and the Vercel AI SDK to build real-time, full-stack AI experiences.

name: Book Review Platform
summary: A full-stack web application where users can browse books, write reviews, and get AI-enriched insights (summary, sentiment, and tags) powered by Mastra AI.

name: Ticketing App
summary: A microservices-based ticketing system. This project is inspired by real-world event-ticketing platforms and demonstrates concepts like event-driven architecture, asynchronous communication, and service isolation.

name: Recipe Shop
summary: Recipe Shop where user can add ingredients list to shop by adding manually at shopping list tab or by importing the ingredients from recipe book.
